source_pdf: synthetic — structured '1 FROM (SHIPPER)' grid layout, not a real upload
note: This fixture exists specifically to catch a regression class hit TWICE during development: both scrambled-layout extractors (classic AWB and thermal label) were, at different points, found to misfire on a genuinely structured document like this one — reading its own field LABELS as if they were data. Keep this passing before shipping any change to services/parsers/Aramex/parser.py.
